channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ancient tablets reveal spells, royal history, and a beer receipt
item.description: Decoded ancient tablets detail magic spells, political figures, and everyday activities from early civilizations. The finds include a record of beer consumption.

item.title: Fossil reveals surprising tyrannosaur behavior
item.description: New research suggests Tyrannosaurs may have been opportunistic feeders, based on analysis of a 75-million-year-old fossil.

item.title: Dwarf Planet Shows Unexpected Atmosphere
item.description: Astronomers have observed a brief, faint atmosphere surrounding a small icy object in the outer Solar System.

item.title: Researchers create novel forms of matter
item.description: A quantum physics study indicates that altering magnetic fields can produce new forms of matter previously unobserved.
